DTC.DESCRIPTION: Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Coolant Pump "A" Control Circuit Driver Current/Temperature Too High

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: CONT_PWR is high
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose TBCP control module over temperature or internal error per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: CONT_PWR is high b) Malfunction Condition: the feedback signal BECM receives from TBCP HWIO indicates pump over temperature or internal error has occurred c) Confirmation Time: 30 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC P0E1F-00 Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Coolant Pump "A" Control Circuit Driver Current/Temperature Too High b) Request the service light to be illuminated c) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. In addition, BECM shall command pump speed to 100% during ODST, and reduce the fault confirmation time to 15 seconds, calibratable. Within the power cycle, if the HWIO indicates the fault is no longer present, BECM shall take 30 seconds maturity time to recover from the fault, stop requesting the service light, and set BattTracClntPump_D_Stat to an appropriate non-fault state. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Component is used as part of the thermal management system.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Malfunction Indicator Lamp (Check Engine). Service Light(Yellow Wrench).

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Hybrid/EV Battery Temperature Sensor System - Multiple Sensor Correlation

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: BECM is operational
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose three or more temperature sensor combined fault per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: BECM is operational b) Malfunction Condition: three or more confirmed req[XEV BECM DIAG FUNC 32], req[XEV BECM DIAG FUNC 33], or req[XEV BECM DIAG FUNC 34] faults at the same time c) Confirmation Time: Event based Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC P0ECA-00 Hybrid/EV Battery Temperature Sensor System - Multiple Sensor Correlation b) Request service light to be illuminated c) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met The BECM shall latch the fault for the current power cycle. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Failure affects battery thermal management system performance.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Malfunction Indicator Lamp (Check Engine). Service Light(Yellow Wrench).

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Hybrid Powertrain Control Module - Vehicle Disabled

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: BECM is operational and HtrnHvilOpen_B_Actl is not missing
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose HPCM interlock circuit open per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: BECM is operational and HtrnHvilOpen_B_Actl is not missing b) Malfunction Condition: HtrnHvilOpen_B_Actl = 0x1: HVIL is Open is received c) Confirmation Time: 1 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC P1A0F-68 Hybrid Powertrain Control Module - Vehicle Disabled - Event Information b) Request warning light to be illuminated c) Set inhibit start for the remaining of the power cycle d) Reduce both long term and short term charging/discharging power limits to 5kW (FHEV/PHEV) or 5kW (BEV) e) Transmit BattChrgRdyStat_D_Actl = 0x5: Fault if conditions for req[PEV BECM ACCHRG FUNC 05] or req[BEV BECM DCCHRG FUNC 05] is satisfied BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault when HtrnHvilOpen_B_Actl= 0x0: Normal Operation is received, without confirmation time, and the state transition of Ignition_Status = 0x1: Off followed by Ignition_Status = 0x4: Run or Ignition_Status = 0x8: Start has occurred. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Safety only component src[eTracker 15049305]
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Power Limiting. Inibit Start. No Charging.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Warning Light.

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_FREEZE_FRAME.DID_REFS: did_F400 did_F402 did_F404 did_F405 did_F40C did_F40D did_F41F did_F420 did_F440 did_F442 did_F449 did_F45B

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: The BECM shall take the following conditions as entry condition number two (2) for communication failure detection. The entry condition number two (2) is satisfied if any of the following conditions is satisfied: a) HEV_WAKEUP is high b) CabinDrvSustn_B_Rq = Active c) BattTracDrvSustn_B_Rq = Active d) PwSustnRdata_B_RqTelem = Active e) BattTracDcFstSustn_B_Rq = Active f) ULoBattTrnsfrSustn_B_Rq = Active g) BptSustn_B_Rq = Active h) BattTracChrgSustn_B_Rq = Active (Single Bus Architectures only)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: req[XEV BECM DIAG FUNC 62] The BECM shall diagnose lost communication with HPCM per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number two (2) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 14] b) Malfunction Condition: message 0x185: PreCond_Hev_Data2 is not received c) Confirmation Time: 1 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM will perform the following: a) Set DTC P1A0F-87 Hybrid Powertrain Control Module - Vehicle Disabled - Missing Message b) Request warning light to be illuminated c) Set inhibit start fault d) Reduce both long term and short term charging/discharging power limits to 5kW (FHEV/PHEV) or 5kW (BEV) e) Set No Charging Fault f) Set No DC BPT Fault g) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met BECM will detect this fault during ODST. The BECM will clear the fault if message 0x185: PreCond_Hev_Data2 is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Some signal in this message is used as part of energy storage thermal management system The intent of this requirement is to treat HtrnHvilOpen_B_Actl and HtrnHvilState_D_Stat missing the same as HtrnHvilOpen_B_Actl and HtrnHvilState_D_Stat reporting interlock open. BattTrac_I_EstVsc will be replaced by BattTrac_I2_EstVsc from CX727 DC2(VP3) and beyond.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Power Limiting. Inibit Start. No Charging. No BPT.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Warning Light. Malfunction Indicator Lamp.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Hybrid/EV Battery Contactor Control Signal

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: BECM is commanding precharge contactor to be closed
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall confirm the occurrence of too many successful precharge within a short period per req[XEV BECM CONTACT FUNC 26]. Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC P1A1E-66 Hybrid/EV Battery Contactor Control Signal - Signal Has Too Many Transitions / Events b) Inhibit start for the remaining of the power cycle c) Request the warning light to be illuminated The BECM shall recover from the fault per recovery strategy defined in req[XEV BECM CONTACT FUNC 26]. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) The scenario can be customer initiated.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Warning Light.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Hybrid/EV Battery Temperature Sensor System - Multiple Sensor Correlation

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: BECM is operational
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: req[BEV BECM DIAG FUNC 227] The BECM shall diagnose all temperature sensors faulted per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: BECM is operational b) Malfunction Condition: All thermistors are faulted per req[XEV BECM DIAG FUNC 32], req[XEV BECM DIAG FUNC 33], or req[XEV BECM DIAG FUNC 34] c) Confirmation Time: Event based Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) No DC Charging Fault b) Set No DC BPT Fault The BECM shall latch the fault for the current power cycle. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) A MIL based on req[XEV BECM DIAG FUNC 35] will always be set first. req[PEV BECM DIAG FUNC 222] The BECM shall diagnose battery temperature difference per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: BECM is operational b) Malfunction Condition: the difference between the minimum and maximum valid thermistor measurement is greater than 40 degree C, calibratable c) Confirmation Time: 6 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC P1A39-00 Hybrid/EV Battery Temperature Sensor System - Multiple Sensor Correlation The BECM shall latch the fault for the current power cycle. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Only used for China data monitoring b) No FMEM actions taken c) Battery sensor fault are covered by other DTCs req[PEV BECM DIAG FUNC 262] The BECM shall pass battery temperature difference as defined in req[PEV BECM DIAG FUNC 222] per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: BECM is operational b) Pass Condition: the difference between the minimum and maximum valid thermistor measurement is <= 40 degree C, calibratable c) Confirmation Time: 6 seconds, calibratable

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Hybrid/EV Battery Charging Disabled - DC Charging Station Performance

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: a) Entry Condition: EvseChrgOutHi_U_Actl, EvseChrgOutHi_I_Actl and DcChrgRdy_D_Stat are not missing and are reporting valid states, BattChrgRdyStat_D_Actl = Charging, DcChrgRdy_D_Stat = Charging, battery pack SOC is less than 80%, calibratable
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: req[BEV BECM DIAG FUNC 271] The BECM shall diagnose overcurrent fault during DC charging per the following strategy: a) Entry condition (all following are satisfied): a. ChrgrInPwMde_D_Actl is not missing and is reporting valid state b. DcChrgRdy_D_Stat is not missing and is reporting valid state c. ChrgrInPwMde_D_Actl = DcCharging d. BattChrgRdyStat_D_Actl = Charging e. DcChrgRdy_D_Stat = Charging f. None of req[XEV BECM DIAG FUNC 86], req[XEV BECM DIAG FUNC 24], req[XEV BECM DIAG FUNC 25], req[XEV BECM DIAG FUNC 26] or req[PEV BECM DIAG FUNC 27] is present b) Malfunction Condition: a. If DesiredCurrent >= 50A, (-BattTrac_I2_Actl DesiredCurrent) >10% * DesiredCurrent b. If DesiredCurrent < 50A, (-BattTrac_I2_Actl DesiredCurrent) > 5A c) Confirmation Time: 10 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC P1A3C-00 Hybrid/EV Battery Charging Disabled - DC Charging Station Performance b) Set No DC charging fault The BECM shall clear the fault when ChrgrInPwMde_D_Actl == EvseNotDetected. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. Note: a - sign is added in front of BattTrac_I2_Actl due to sign convention.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: req[BEV BECM DIAG FUNC 271] Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC P1A3C-00 Hybrid/EV Battery Charging Disabled - DC Charging Station Performance b) Set No DC charging fault
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: req[BEV BECM DIAG FUNC 271] Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC P1A3C-00 Hybrid/EV Battery Charging Disabled - DC Charging Station Performance b) Set No DC charging fault

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Propulsion System Status Signal Performance

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: a) HEV_WAKEUP is high b) CabinDrvSustn_B_Rq = Active c) BattTracDrvSustn_B_Rq = Active d) PwSustnRdata_B_RqTelem = Active e) BattTracDcFstSustn_B_Rq = Active f) ULoBattTrnsfrSustn_B_Rq = Active This entry condition corresponds to HPCM communication failure
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose PwPckTq_D_Stat signal performance fault per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number two (2) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 14] b) Malfunction Condition: message 0x167: VehicleOperatingModes is not received c) Confirmation Time: 5 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC P1A42-00 Propulsion System Status Signal Performance BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault if message 0x167:VehicleOperatingModes is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) BEV only The BECM shall diagnose PwPckTq_D_Stat signal performance fault per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number one (1) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 13] b) Malfunction Condition: message 0x167: VehicleOperatingModes is not received c) Confirmation Time: 5 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC P1A42-00 Propulsion System Status Signal Performance b) Request the MIL to be illuminated. This is a one-trip MIL. BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault if message 0x167:VehicleOperatingModes is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) PwPckTq_D_Stat signal from this message is used to determine drive cycle, which is used to confirm two-trip MILs. The BECM shall diagnose PwPckTq_D_Stat signal performance fault per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number one (1) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 13] b) Malfunction Condition: message 0x167: VehicleOperatingModes is not received c) Confirmation Time: 5 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC P1A42-00 Propulsion System Status Signal Performance b) Request the MIL to be illuminated. This is a one-trip MIL. BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault if message 0x167:VehicleOperatingModes is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) PwPckTq_D_Stat signal from this message is used to determine drive cycle, which is used to confirm two-trip MILs.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Malfunction Indicator Lamp (Check Engine).

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Hybrid/EV Battery Contactor Request Signal Performance

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: a) HEV_WAKEUP is high b) CabinDrvSustn_B_Rq = Active c) BattTracDrvSustn_B_Rq = Active d) PwSustnRdata_B_RqTelem = Active e) BattTracDcFstSustn_B_Rq = Active f) ULoBattTrnsfrSustn_B_Rq = Active This entry condition corresponds to HPCM communication failure
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose BattTracCnnct_D_Rq performance fault per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number two (2) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 14] b) Malfunction Condition: message 0x25B: HEV_Powertrain_Data2 is not received c) Confirmation Time: 1 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC P1A43-00 Hybrid/EV Battery Contactor Request Signal Performance BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault if message 0x25B: HEV_Powertrain_Data2 is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) BEV only The BECM shall diagnose BattTracCnnct_D_Rq performance fault per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number one (1) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 13] b) Malfunction Condition: message 0x25B: HEV_Powertrain_Data2 is not received c) Confirmation Time: 1 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC P1A43-00 Hybrid/EV Battery Contactor Request Signal Performance b) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met. BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault if message 0x25B: HEV_Powertrain_Data2 is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Losing this message or losing communication with PCM completely will result in vehicle contactor not able to be closed, thus affects electric propulsion. The BECM shall diagnose BattTracCnnct_D_Rq performance fault per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number two (2) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 14] b) Malfunction Condition: BattTracCnnct_D_Rq = Not Used is received c) Confirmation Time: 5 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC P1A43-00 Hybrid/EV Battery Contactor Request Signal Performance BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault if BattTracCnnct_D_Rq != Not Used is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) BEV only The BECM shall diagnose BattTracCnnct_D_Rq performance fault per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number one (1) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 13] b) Malfunction Condition: BattTracCnnct_D_Rq = Not Used is received c) Confirmation Time: 5 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC P1A43-00 Hybrid/EV Battery Contactor Request Signal Performance b) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault if BattTracCnnct_D_Rq != Not Used is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Failure will result in vehicle contactors cannot be properly open or closed, thus affects electric propulsion The BECM shall diagnose BattTracCnnct_D_Rq performance fault per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number one (1) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 13] b) Malfunction Condition: message 0x25B: HEV_Powertrain_Data2 is not received c) Confirmation Time: 1 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC P1A43-00 Hybrid/EV Battery Contactor Request Signal Performance b) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met. BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault if message 0x25B: HEV_Powertrain_Data2 is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Losing this message or losing communication with PCM completely will result in vehicle contactor not able to be closed, thus affects electric propulsion. The BECM shall diagnose BattTracCnnct_D_Rq performance fault per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number one (1) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 13] b) Malfunction Condition: BattTracCnnct_D_Rq = Not Used is received c) Confirmation Time: 5 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC P1A43-00 Hybrid/EV Battery Contactor Request Signal Performance b) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault if BattTracCnnct_D_Rq != Not Used is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Failure will result in vehicle contactors cannot be properly open or closed, thus affects electric propulsion Entry condition one is used here for common strategy. MHT and P/S PHEV does not need this signal during key off AC charging. Thus, only detect when HEV_WAKEUP is high
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Malfunction Indicator Lamp (Check Engine).

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Control Module Power Off Timer Performance

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: BECM is operational
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose key off timer malfunction per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: BECM is operational b) Malfunction Condition: BECM HWIO feedback indicates key off timer malfunction is detected c) Confirmation Time: 0.1 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set P262B-00 Control Module Power Off Timer Performance b) Request the service light to be illuminated c) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met The BECM shall latch the fault for the current power cycle. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Internal clock is used in another monitor
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Malfunction Indicator Lamp (Check Engine). Service Light(Yellow Wrench).

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Hybrid/EV Battery "A" Thermal Runaway Detected

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: BECM is operational
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If any of the following conditions are true: a) Any cell voltage hazard flags* AND any thermistor hazard flags** are present b) More than minimum_multi_cell_hazard number of cell hazard flags are present and average of the cell voltages are above cell_voltage_hazard_average_threshold c) (Any BMIC OR Open wire DTCs) AND any thermistor hazard flags are present BECM shall do the following: a) Set BattTracHzard_D_Stat = Hazard Confirmed b) Set the DTC P29FF c) Reset and Stop HazardConfirmationTimer d) Start HazardAlarmTimer * A cell voltage hazard flag is set when the voltage drops below cell_voltage_hazard_low_threshold or rises above cell_voltage_hazard_high_threshold for minimum of cell_hazard_confirmation_time **A thermistor event happens when the temperature rises above temperature_hazard_threshold for minimum of temperature_hazard_confirmation_time

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Coolant Pump "A" Overspeed /Air in System

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: CONT_PWR is high
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose MECP dry-run error per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: CONT_PWR is high b) Malfunction Condition: the feedback signal BECM receives from TBCP HWIO indicates pump dry-run error has occurred c) Confirmation Time: 30 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC P2B29-00 Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Coolant Pump "A" Overspeed /Air in System b) Request the service light to be illuminated c) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. In addition, BECM shall command pump speed to 100% during ODST, and reduce the fault confirmation time to 15 seconds, calibratable. Within the power cycle, if the HWIO indicates the fault is no longer present, BECM shall take 30 seconds maturity time to recover from the fault, stop requesting the service light, and set BattTracClntPump_D_Stat to an appropriate non-fault state. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Component is used as part of the thermal management system.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Malfunction Indicator Lamp (Check Engine). Service Light(Yellow Wrench).

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Battery Charging System Positive Contactor "B" Stuck Closed

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: BECM is commanding DC fast charge positive contactor to be open
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose DC fast charge positive contactor stuck closed per req[BEV BECM CONTACT FUNC 32]. Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC P2BC5-00 Battery Charging System Positive Contactor "B" Stuck Closed b) Transmit BattChrgRdyStat_D_Actl = 0x5: Fault if conditions for req[BEV BECM DCCHRG FUNC 05] is satisfied c) Request the service light to be illuminated The BECM shall latch the fault until a technician clear this DTC This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) DC charging is BEV only, no emissions.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Service Light(Yellow Wrench).

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Battery Charging System Positive Contactor "B" Stuck Open

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: BECM is commanding both DC fast charge positive and negative contactor closed
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose DC fast charge contactor stuck open per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: BECM is commanding both DC fast charge positive and negative contactor closed b) Malfunction Condition: BECM HWIO feedback reports the voltage measured at DC fast charge port is outside 10% of battery pack voltage c) Confirmation Time: 2.4 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC P2BC6-00 Battery Charging System Positive Contactor "B" Stuck Open b) Transmit BattChrgRdyStat_D_Actl = 0x5: Fault if conditions for req[BEV BECM DCCHRG FUNC 05] is satisfied c) Request the service light to be illuminated The BECM shall latch the fault for the current power cycle, if the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) BEV only.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Service Light(Yellow Wrench).

This fault does not results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) DC charging is BEV only, no emissions.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose FCHRG_POS_CONT short circuit fault per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: BECM is commanding DC fast charge positive contactor to be closed b) Malfunction Condition: FCHRG_POS_CONT HWIO reports coil overcurrent state c) Confirmation Time: 20 milliseconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC P2BCA-00 Battery Charging System Positive Contactor "B" Control Circuit High b) Transmit BattChrgRdyStat_D_Actl = 0x5: Fault if conditions for req[BEV BECM DCCHRG FUNC 05] is satisfied c) Request the service light to be illuminated The BECM shall latch the fault for the current power cycle. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) DC charging is BEV only, no emissions.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Battery Charging System Negative Contactor "B" Stuck Closed

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: BECM is commanding DC fast charge negative contactor to be open
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If BECM confirms DC fast charge negative contactor is welded, as per req[BEV BECM CONTACT FUNC 32], the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC P2BCC-00 Battery Charging System Negative Contactor "B" Stuck Closed b) Perform normal BPO c) Transmit VehStrtInhbt_B_RqBatt = 0x1: Yes d) Request the warning light to be illuminated The BECM shall latch the fault until a technician clear this DTC. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) DC charging is BEV only, no emissions.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Battery Power Off/Shut-down. No Restart. No Charging.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Warning Light.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage External Isolation Fault

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: BECM is operational, leakage detection circuit is not faulted, and DC charge contactors are being commanded closed
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose external leakage fault per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: BECM is operational, leakage detection circuit is not faulted, and DC charge contactors are being commanded closed b) Malfunction Condition: the leakage resistance measurement indicates severe leakage fault exists c) Confirmation Time: three out of five detects, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set P2C85-00 Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage External Isolation Fault The BECM shall clear the fault when the DC charge contactors are being commanded open. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Safety only component b) BEV only This requirement is China BEV only. The BECM shall diagnose external leakage fault per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: BECM is operational, and DC charge contactors are being commanded closed b) Malfunction Condition: EvseDcChrgIso_D_Stat = Faulty is received c) Confirmation Time: Event Based Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set P2C85-00 Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage External Isolation Fault The BECM shall clear the fault when the DC charge contactors are being commanded open. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Safety only component b) BEV only This requirement is for NA/EU BEV only.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Hybrid/EV Battery System Precharge "A" Current Too High

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: BECM is commanding precharge contactor to be closed
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose precharge overcurrent per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: BECM is commanding precharge contactor to be closed b) Malfunction Condition: the current flows out of high voltage battery is greater than 10A, 7A, or 5A, calibratable c) Confirmation Time: 50ms, 100ms, or 300ms, respectfully, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set P2C89-00 Hybrid/EV Battery System Precharge Current Too High b) Request the warning light to be illuminated c) Terminate current contactor close sequence d) Inhibit start for the remaining of the power cycle e) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met The BECM shall latch the fault for the current power cycle, if the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Precharge malfunction results in main contactor cannot be closed.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Malfunction Indicator Lamp (Check Engine). Warning Light.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Coolant Pump "A" Underspeed

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: CONT_PWR is high
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose TBCP under speed error per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: CONT_PWR is high b) Malfunction Condition: the feedback signal BECM receives from TBCP HWIO indicates pump impeller speed below minimum speed error has occurred c) Confirmation Time: 30 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC P2CF3-00 Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Coolant Pump "A" Underspeed b) Request the service light to be illuminated c) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. In addition, BECM shall command pump speed to 100% during ODST, and reduce the fault confirmation time to 15 seconds, calibratable. Within the power cycle, if the HWIO indicates the fault is no longer present, BECM shall take 30 seconds maturity time to recover from the fault, stop requesting the service light, and set BattTracClntPump_D_Stat to an appropriate non-fault state. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Component is used as part of the thermal management system.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Malfunction Indicator Lamp (Check Engine). Service Light(Yellow Wrench).

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Motor Electronics Coolant Pump "A" Stuck/Stalled

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: CONT_PWR is high
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose MECP stall fault per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: CONT_PWR is high b) Malfunction Condition: the feedback signal BECM receives from MECP HWIO indicates the physical pump stuck/stall fault has occurred c) Confirmation Time: 30 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC P2D00-00 Motor Electronics Coolant Pump "A" Stuck/Stalled b) Request the service light to be illuminated c) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. In addition, BECM shall command pump speed to 100% during ODST, and reduce the fault confirmation time to 15 seconds, calibratable. Within the power cycle, if the HWIO indicates the fault is no longer present, BECM shall take 30 seconds maturity time to recover from the fault, stop requesting the service light, and set HtrnClntPump_D_Stat to an appropriate non-fault state. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Component is used as part of the thermal management system.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Malfunction Indicator Lamp (Check Engine). Service Light(Yellow Wrench).

DTC.DESCRIPTION: High Voltage System Voltage High

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: BECM is operational
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: req[PEV BECM DIAG FUNC 223] The BECM shall diagnose battery voltage voltage per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: BECM is operational b) Malfunction Condition: The battery pack voltage is greater than 4.5V/cell equivalent, i.e., pack voltage is greater than 432V for a 96-cell pack c) Confirmation Time: 1 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC P2D9F-00: High Voltage System Voltage High The BECM shall latch the fault for the current power cycle. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Only used for China data monitoring b) No FMEM actions taken c) Battery pack over charge is covered by DTC P0AFB Rationale of 4.5V/cell: Functional safety limit is 4.55V/cell, calibration picked such that it is lower than FuSa limit, but higher than BattChrgUMx_B_Falt calibration. req[PEV BECM DIAG FUNC 263] The BECM shall pass battery voltage as defined in req[PEV BECM DIAG FUNC 223] per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: BECM is operational b) Pass Condition: The battery pack voltage is <= 4.5V/cell equivalent, i.e., pack voltage is <= 432V for a 96-cell pack c) Confirmation Time: 1 second, calibratable

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Restraints Event - Vehicle Disabled

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: BECM is operational
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall determine the occurrence of fuel cut-off event per req[XEV BECM ENS FUNC 01]. Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC B11D5-00 Restraints Event - Vehicle Disabled b) Request the warning light to be illuminated c) Perform fast BPO as per req[XEV BECM ENS FUNC 02] d) Transmit BattChrgRdyStat_D_Actl = 0x5: Fault if conditions for req[PEV BECM ACCHRG FUNC 05] or req[PEV BECM DCCHRG FUNC 05] is satisfied e) Inhibit start for the remaining of the power cycle BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault per req[XEV BECM ENS FUNC 07] This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Safety only component.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Battery Power Off/Shut-down. Inibit Start. No Charging.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Warning Light.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Restraint Event Notification

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: Ignition_Status is not missing and is reporting valid state, HEV_WAKEUP is not faulted, Ignition_Status = 0x4: Run, HEV_WAKEUP is high, and 12V battery voltage is greater than or equal to 8V, calibratable
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose ENS circuit short to ground fault per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Ignition_Status is not missing and is reporting valid state, HEV_WAKEUP is not faulted, Ignition_Status = 0x4: Run, HEV_WAKEUP is high, and 12V battery voltage is greater than or equal to 8V, calibratable b) Malfunction Condition: ENS circuit BECM measurement indicates ENS pin is short to ground c) Confirmation Time: 10 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC B11D8-11 Restraint Event Notification - Circuit Short To Ground b) Request the service light to be illuminated BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault when the malfunction condition is no longer present, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Safety only component.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Service Light(Yellow Wrench).

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose ENS circuit signal frequency incorrect per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Ignition_Status is not missing and is reporting valid state, HEV_WAKEUP is not faulted, Ignition_Status = 0x4: Run, HEV_WAKEUP is high, and 12V battery voltage is greater than or equal to 8V, calibratable b) Malfunction Condition: ENS circuit BECM measurement indicates ENS signal frequency cannot be determined c) Confirmation Time: 10 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC B11D8-29 Restraint Event Notification - Signal Invalid b) Request the service light to be illuminated BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault when the malfunction condition is no longer present, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Safety only component.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Service Light(Yellow Wrench).

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose ENS circuit signal frequency incorrect per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Ignition_Status is not missing and is reporting valid state, HEV_WAKEUP is not faulted, Ignition_Status = 0x4: Run, HEV_WAKEUP is high, and 12V battery voltage is greater than or equal to 8V, calibratable b) Malfunction Condition: ENS circuit BECM measurement indicates ENS signal frequency is in normal range, but the signal pattern does not match specification, as per req[XEV BECM ENS IPT 01] c) Confirmation Time: 10 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC B11D8-38 Restraint Event Notification - Signal Frequency Incorrect b) Request the service light to be illuminated BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With ECM/PCM "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry condition: any of the following conditions is satisfied: a) HEV_WAKEUP is high b) BattTracChrgSustn_B_Rq = Active c) ULoBattSpprtSustn_B_Rq = Active d) CabinDrvSustn_B_Rq = Active e) BattTracDrvSustn_B_Rq = Active f) PwSustnRdata_B_RqTelem = Active g) ULoBattTrnsfrSustn_B_Rq = Active This entry condition corresponds to PCM communication failure
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose lost communication with PCM per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number four (4) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 16] b) Malfunction Condition: message 0x480: HEV_Powertrain_Data6 is not received c) Confirmation Time: 5 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0100-00 Lost Communication With ECM / PCM "A" b) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met. BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault if message 0x480: HEV_Powertrain_Data6 is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Singal from PCM is used to age DTC. The BECM shall diagnose lost communication with PCM per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number four (4) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 16] b) Malfunction Condition: message 0x42D: PowertrainData_2 is not received c) Confirmation Time: 5 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0100-00 Lost Communication With ECM / PCM "A" b) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met. BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault if message 0x42D: PowertrainData_2 is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Signal from PCM is used to age DTCs. The BECM shall diagnose lost communication with PCM per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number four (4) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 16] b) Malfunction Condition: message 0x204: EngVehicleSpThrottle is not received c) Confirmation Time: 5 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0100-00 Lost Communication With ECM / PCM "A" b) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met. The BECM shall clear the fault if message 0x204:EngVehicleSpThrottle is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Signal from PCM is used to age DTC. The BECM shall diagnose lost communication with PCM per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number four (4) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 16] b) Malfunction Condition: message 0x202: EngVehicleSpThrottle2 is not received c) Confirmation Time: 5 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0100-00 Lost Communication With ECM / PCM "A" b) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met. The BECM shall clear the fault if message 0x202: EngVehicleSpThrottle2 is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Signal from PCM is used to age DTC. The BECM shall manage each ChrgrSysFaltXX_D_Stat flags as listed in Table 26 independently. The BECM shall treat each ChrgrSysFaltXX_D_Stat = 0x1: Fail flag as a two trip MIL fault counter. BECM shall ignore other ChrgrSysFalXX_D_Stat signals that are not listed in the table.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Malfunction Indicator Lamp (Check Engine).

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Body Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry condition: any of the following conditions is satisfied: a) HEV_WAKEUP is high b) BattTracChrgSustn_B_Rq = Active c) ULoBattSpprtSustn_B_Rq = Active d) CabinDrvSustn_B_Rq = Active e) BattTracDrvSustn_B_Rq = Active f) ULoBattTrnsfrSustn_B_Rq = Active This entry condition corresponds to BCM communication failure
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose lost communication with BCM per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number three (3) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 15] b) Malfunction Condition: message 0x3B3: BodyInfo_3 is not received c) Confirmation Time: 5 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0140-00 Lost Communication With Body Control Module The BECM shall clear the fault if message 0x3B3: BodyInfo_3 is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) No action taken to this fault. b) All Diagnostic Monitors complete normally. c) Charging performance not affected. d) Electric motor propulsion not affected. e) Regen Braking not affected. f) Emissions not affected

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Serial Data Gateway Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry condition: any of the following conditions is satisfied: a) HEV_WAKEUP is high b) DataMntrSustn_B_Rq = Active c) PwSustnRdata_B_RqTelem = Active d) BptSustn_B_Rq = Active This entry condition corresponds to ECG communication failure
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: ECG_Data2_HS1 message missing req[PEV BECM DIAG FUNC 283] The BECM shall diagnose lost communication with ECG per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: BECM is operational and transmitting on CAN Entry condition number Nine (9) as specified in req[PEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 36] b) Malfunction Condition: message 0x488: ECG_Data2_HS1 is not received c) Confirmation Time: 5 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, BECM performs the following: a) Set DTC U0146-00 Lost Communication with Serial Data Gateway A The BECM will clear the fault if message 0x488: ECG_Data2_HS1 is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM will not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Charging not affected b) Emissions not affected
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Once the fault condition is confirmed, BECM performs the following: a) Set DTC U0146-00 Lost Communication with Serial Data Gateway A

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Restraints Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry condition: a) HEV_WAKEUP is high b) Ignition_Status = Run This entry condition corresponds to RCM communication failure In BECM implementation, if Ignition_Status is not present on CAN for 2 seconds, BECM considers this entry condition is not satisfied.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose lost communication with RCM per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number seven (7) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 19] b) Malfunction Condition: message 0x4C: RCMStatusMessage2_HS1 is not received c) Confirmation Time: 5 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0151-00 Lost Communication With Restraints Control Module BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault if message 0x4C: RCMStatusMessage2_HS1 is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Safety only component

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Instrument Panel Cluster (IPC) Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: BECM is operational
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose lost communication with IPC per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number seven (7) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 19] b) Malfunction Condition: message 0x430: Cluster_Info1_HS1 is not received c) Confirmation Time: vcn_five_sec_tm Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0155-00 Lost Communication With Instrument Panel Cluster (IPC) Control Module The BECM shall clear the fault if message 0x430: Cluster_Info1_HS1 is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) No emission impacted b) All diagnostic monitors complete normally

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Battery Charger Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: any of the following conditions is satisfied: a) HEV_WAKEUP is high b) BattTracChrgSustn_B_Rq = Active c) ULoBattSpprtSustn_B_Rq = Active d) CabinDrvSustn_B_Rq = Active e) BattTracDrvSustn_B_Rq = Active f) DataMntrSustn_B_Rq = Active g) PwSustnRdata_B_RqTelem = Active h) ULoBattTrnsfrSustn_B_Rq = Active This entry condition corresponds to DCDC and BCCM communication failure
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose lost communication with BCCM per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number five (5) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 17] b) Malfunction Condition: message 0x2EC: BatteryCharge_Data1 is not received c) Confirmation Time: 5 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U019B-00 Lost Communication With Battery Charger Control Module b) Transmit BattChrgRdyStat_D_Actl = 0x5: Fault if conditions for req[PEV BECM ACCHRG FUNC 05] or req[PEV BECM DCCHRG FUNC 05] is satisfied c) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault if message 0x2EC: BatteryCharge_Data1 is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Losing this message or losing communication with BCCM completely will result in vehicle not be able to be charged or charging being terminated. The BECM shall diagnose lost communication with BCCM per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number five (5) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 17] b) Malfunction Condition: message 0x45E: BatteryCharge_Data2 is not received c) Confirmation Time: 5 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U019B-00 Lost Communication with Battery Charger Control Module b) Transmit BattChrgRdyStat_D_Actl = 0x5: Fault if conditions for req[PEV BECM ACCHRG FUNC 05] or req[BEV BECM DCCHRG FUNC 05] is satisfied c) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault if message 0x45E: BatteryCharge_Data2 is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Losing this message or losing communication with BCCM completely will result in vehicle not be able to be charged. The BECM shall diagnose lost communication with BCCM per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number five (5) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 17] b) Malfunction Condition: message 0x2ED: BatteryCharge_Data3 is not received c) Confirmation Time: 5 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U019B-00 Lost Communication with Battery Charger Control Module b) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault if message 0x2ED: BatteryCharge_Data3 is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Secondary OBD module fault status signal b) Losing communication with BCCM completely will result in vehicle not be able to be charged
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Malfunction Indicator Lamp (Check Engine).

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Off-Board Charger Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry condition: HEV_WAKEUP is high.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose lost communication with GFM2_DCGM per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number one (1) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 13] b) Malfunction Condition: message 0x2E7: DgtlCommGtwy_1 is not received c) Confirmation Time: 5 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U027C-00 Lost Communication With Off-Board Charger Control Module The BECM shall clear the fault if message 0x2E7: DgtlCommGtwy_1 is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) BEV only The BECM shall diagnose lost communication with GFM2_DCGM per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number one (1) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 13] b) Malfunction Condition: message 0x449: DigitalComm_Data2 is not received c) Confirmation Time: 5 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U027C-00 Lost Communication With Off-Board Charger Control Module b) Transmit BattChrgRdyStat_D_Actl = 0x5: Fault if conditions for req[BEV BECM DCCHRG FUNC 05] is satisfied The BECM shall clear the fault if message 0x449: DigitalComm_Data2 is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) BEV only The BECM shall diagnose lost communication with GFM2_DCGM per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number one (1) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 13] b) Malfunction Condition: message 0x25F: DigitalComm_Data is not received c) Confirmation Time: 5 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U027C-00 Lost Communication With Off-Board Charger Control Module b) Transmit BattChrgRdyStat_D_Actl = 0x5: Fault if conditions for req[BEV BECM DCCHRG FUNC 05] is satisfied The BECM shall clear the fault if message 0x25F: DigitalComm_Data is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) BEV only

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Hybrid/EV Powertrain Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry condition: any of the following conditions is satisfied: a) HEV_WAKEUP is high b) CabinDrvSustn_B_Rq = Active c) BattTracDrvSustn_B_Rq = Active d) PwSustnRdata_B_RqTelem = Active e) BattTracDcFstSustn_B_Rq = Active f) ULoBattTrnsfrSustn_B_Rq = Active This entry condition corresponds to HPCM communication failure
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: req[XEV BECM DIAG FUNC 56] The BECM shall diagnose lost communication with HPCM per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number two (2) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 14] b) Malfunction Condition: message 0x478: MHT_EV_Wakeup is not received c) Confirmation Time: 5 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0293-00 Lost Communication with Hybrid/EV Powertrain Control Module b) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault if message 0x478: MHT_EV_Wakeup is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Signals in this message are part of energy storage system thermal management system req[XEV BECM DIAG FUNC 62] The BECM shall diagnose lost communication with HPCM per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number two (2) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 14] b) Malfunction Condition: message 0x185: PreCond_Hev_Data2 is not received c) Confirmation Time: 1 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0293-00 Lost Communication with Hybrid/EV Powertrain Control Module b) Request warning light to be illuminated c) Set inhibit start fault d) Reduce both long term and short term charging/discharging power limits to 5kW (FHEV/PHEV) or 5kW (BEV) e) Set No Charging Fault f) Set No DC BPT Fault g) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault if message 0x185: PreCond_Hev_Data2 is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Some signal in this message is used as part of energy storage thermal management system The intent of this requirement is to treat HtrnHvilOpen_B_Actl missing the same as HtrnHvilOpen_B_Actl reporting interlock open. BattTrac_I_EstVsc will be replaced by BattTrac_I2_EstVsc from CX727 DC2(VP3) and beyond. req[BEV BECM DIAG FUNC 200] The BECM shall diagnose lost communication with PCM per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number two (2) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 14] b) Malfunction Condition: message 0x25A: HEV_Powertrain_Data_HS1 is not received c) Confirmation Time: 5 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0293-00 Lost Communication with Hybrid/EV Powertrain Control Module The BECM shall clear the fault if message 0x25A: HEV_Powertrain_Data_HS1 is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) BEV only req[PEV BECM DIAG FUNC 209] The BECM shall diagnose lost communication with HPCM per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number two (2) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 14] b) Malfunction Condition: message 0x302: SmartChargingData_HPCM_HS1 is not received c) Confirmation Time: vcn_five_sec_tm Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0293-00 Lost Communication with Hybrid/EV Powertrain Control Module b) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met The BECM shall clear the fault if message 0x302: SmartChargingData_HPCM_HS1 is received, without confirmation time. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Losing communication with HPCM completely will affect battery thermal management system req[XEV BECM DIAG FUNC 213] The BECM shall diagnose lost communication with HPCM per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number two (2) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 14] b) Malfunction Condition: message 0x410: AC_Compressor_Req is not received c) Confirmation Time: 5 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0293-00 Lost Communication with Hybrid/EV Powertrain Control Module b) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met The BECM shall clear the fault if 0x410: AC_Compressor_Req is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Losing this message will not affect emissions. b) However, losing communication with HPCM completely will impact thermal management system. req[BEV BECM DIAG FUNC 238] The BECM shall diagnose lost communication with HPCM per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number two (2) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 14] b) Malfunction Condition: message 0x201: Cluster_HEV_Data11_HS1 is not received c) Confirmation Time: 5 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0293-00 Lost Communication with Hybrid/EV Powertrain Control Module b) Set No DC BPT fault The BECM shall clear the fault if 0x201: Cluster_HEV_Data11_HS1 is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) BEV only
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: req[XEV BECM DIAG FUNC 56] Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0293-00 Lost Communication with Hybrid/EV Powertrain Control Module b) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met req[XEV BECM DIAG FUNC 62] Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0293-00 Lost Communication with Hybrid/EV Powertrain Control Module b) Request warning light to be illuminated c) Set inhibit start fault d) Reduce both long term and short term charging/discharging power limits to 5kW (FHEV/PHEV) or 5kW (BEV) e) Set No Charging Fault f) Set No DC BPT Fault g) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met req[BEV BECM DIAG FUNC 238] Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0293-00 Lost Communication with Hybrid/EV Powertrain Control Module b) Set No DC BPT fault
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: req[XEV BECM DIAG FUNC 56] Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0293-00 Lost Communication with Hybrid/EV Powertrain Control Module b) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met req[XEV BECM DIAG FUNC 62] Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0293-00 Lost Communication with Hybrid/EV Powertrain Control Module b) Request warning light to be illuminated c) Set inhibit start fault d) Reduce both long term and short term charging/discharging power limits to 5kW (FHEV/PHEV) or 5kW (BEV) e) Set No Charging Fault f) Set No DC BPT Fault g) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met req[PEV BECM DIAG FUNC 209] Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0293-00 Lost Communication with Hybrid/EV Powertrain Control Module b) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met req[XEV BECM DIAG FUNC 213] Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0293-00 Lost Communication with Hybrid/EV Powertrain Control Module b) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With DC/DC Converter Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry condition: any of the following conditions is satisfied: a) HEV_WAKEUP is high b) BattTracChrgSustn_B_Rq = Active c) ULoBattSpprtSustn_B_Rq = Active d) CabinDrvSustn_B_Rq = Active e) BattTracDrvSustn_B_Rq = Active f) DataMntrSustn_B_Rq = Active g) PwSustnRdata_B_RqTelem = Active h) ULoBattTrnsfrSustn_B_Rq = Active This entry condition corresponds to DCDC and BCCM communication failure
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose lost communication with DCDC per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number five (5) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 17] b) Malfunction Condition: message 0x43D: Low_Voltage_Power_Data is not received c) Confirmation Time: 5 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0298-00 Lost Communication With DC/DC Converter Control Module "A" BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault if message 0x43D: Low_Voltage_Power_Data is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) No action taken to this fault. b) All Diagnostic Monitors complete normally. c) Charging performance not affected. d) Electric motor propulsion not affected. e) Regen Braking not affected. f) Emissions not affected The BECM shall diagnose lost communication with DCDC per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number five (5) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 17] b) Malfunction Condition: message 0x45F: Low_Voltage_Power_Data2 is not received c) Confirmation Time: 5 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0298-00 Lost Communication With DC/DC Converter Control Module "A" BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault if message 0x45F: Low_Voltage_Power_Data2 is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) No action taken to this fault. b) All Diagnostic Monitors complete normally. c) Charging performance not affected. d) Electric motor propulsion not affected. e) Regen Braking not affected. f) Emissions not affected

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Internal Control Module Software Incompatibility

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: At BECM power up
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose incompatible software error per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: At BECM power up b) Malfunction Condition: BECM software does not match the BECM hardware, per part number c) Confirmation Time: Event Based Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set U0300-00 Internal Control Module Software Incompatibility b) Request the warning light to be illuminated c) Transmit BattChrgRdyStat_D_Actl = 0x5: Fault if conditions for req[PEV BECM ACCHRG FUNC 05] or req[BEV BECM DCCHRG FUNC 05] is satisfied d) Set inhibit start for the remaining of the power cycle e) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall latch the fault for the current power cycle. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Failure will result in vehicle not able to start
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Malfunction Indicator Lamp (Check Engine). Warning Light.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Software Incompatibility with Battery Energy Control Module A

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: At BECM power up
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose incompatible software error per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: At BECM power up b) Malfunction Condition: BECM software does not match the BECM hardware, per cell count c) Confirmation Time: Event Based Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set U0312-00 Software Incompatibility with Battery Energy Control Module A b) Request the service light to be illuminated c) Reduce both long term and short term charging/discharging power limits to 5kW (FHEV/PHEV) or 5kW (BEV) d) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall latch the fault for the current power cycle. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Failure will result in battery power limiting
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Malfunction Indicator Lamp (Check Engine). Service Light(Yellow Wrench).

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Instrument Panel Cluster Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: BECM is operational
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose invalid OdometerMasterValue received per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number seven (7) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 19] b) Malfunction Condition: OdometerMasterValue = Invalid is received c) Confirmation Time: vcn_five_sec_tm Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0423-00 Invalid Data Received from Instrument Panel Cluster Control Module The BECM shall clear the fault if OdometerMasterValue != Invalid is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) No emission impacted b) All diagnostic monitors complete normally

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Body Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry condition: any of the following conditions is satisfied: a) HEV_WAKEUP is high b) BattTracChrgSustn_B_Rq = Active c) ULoBattSpprtSustn_B_Rq = Active d) CabinDrvSustn_B_Rq = Active e) BattTracDrvSustn_B_Rq = Active f) ULoBattTrnsfrSustn_B_Rq = Active This entry condition corresponds to BCM communication failure
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose invalid Ignition_Status received per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number three (3) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 15] b) Malfunction Condition: Ignition_Status = Invalid is received c) Confirmation Time: 5 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0431-00 Invalid Data Received from Body Control Module "A" The BECM shall clear the fault if Ignition_Status != Invalid is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) No action taken to this fault. b) All Diagnostic Monitors complete normally. c) Charging performance not affected. d) Electric motor propulsion not affected. e) Regen Braking not affected. f) Emissions not affected

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Restraints Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry condition: a) HEV_WAKEUP is high b) Ignition_Status = Run This entry condition corresponds to RCM communication failure In BECM implementation, if Ignition_Status is not present on CAN for 2 seconds, BECM considers this entry condition is not satisfied.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose invalid RstrnImpactEvntStatus received per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number seven (7) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 19] b) Malfunction Condition: RstrnImpactEvntStatus = Not Used or Invalid is received c) Confirmation Time: 5 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0452-00 Invalid Data Received From Restraints Control Module BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault if RstrnImpactEvntStatus != Not Used or Invalid is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Safety only component
