DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Battery Charger Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: any of the following conditions is satisfied: a) HEV_WAKEUP is high b) BattTracChrgSustn_B_Rq = Active c) ULoBattSpprtSustn_B_Rq = Active d) CabinDrvSustn_B_Rq = Active e) BattTracDrvSustn_B_Rq = Active f) DataMntrSustn_B_Rq = Active g) PwSustnRdata_B_RqTelem = Active h) ULoBattTrnsfrSustn_B_Rq = Active This entry condition corresponds to DCDC and BCCM communication failure
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose invalid ChrgrIn_Pw_Mx received per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number five (5) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 17] b) Malfunction Condition: ChrgrIn_Pw_Mx = 0xFFF: Faulty is received c) Confirmation Time: 5 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U049C-00 Invalid Data Received From Battery Charger Control Module b) Transmit BattChrgRdyStat_D_Actl = 0x5: Fault if conditions for req[PEV BECM ACCHRG FUNC 05] or req[PEV BECM DCCHRG FUNC 05] is satisfied c) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault if ChrgrIn_Pw_Mx != 0xFFF: Faulty is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Vehicle charging will be unintentionally paused if ChrgrIn_Pw_Mx reports an invalid data The BECM shall diagnose invalid ChrgrOutHi_I_Actl received per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number five (5) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 17] b) Malfunction Condition: ChrgrOutHi_I_Actl = Invalid is received c) Confirmation Time: 5 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U049C-00 Invalid Data Received From Battery Charger Control Module b) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault if ChrgrOutHi_I_Actl != Invalid is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Signal is used as part of another diagnostic monitor The BECM shall diagnose invalid ChrgrOutHi_U_Actl received per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number five (5) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 17] b) Malfunction Condition: ChrgrOutHi_U_Actl = Invalid is received c) Confirmation Time: 5 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U049C-00 Invalid Data Received From Battery Charger Control Module b) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault if ChrgrOutHi_U_Actl != Invalid is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Signal is used as part of diagnostic monitor The BECM shall diagnose invalid ChrgrRdyStat_D_Actl received per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number five (5) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 17] b) Malfunction Condition: ChrgrRdyStat_D_Actl = Not Used is received c) Confirmation Time: 5 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U049C-00 Invalid Data Received From Battery Charger Control Module b) Transmit BattChrgRdyStat_D_Actl = 0x5: Fault if conditions for req[PEV BECM ACCHRG FUNC 05] or req[BEV BECM DCCHRG FUNC 05] is satisfied c) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault if ChrgrRdyStat_D_Actl != Not Used is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Failure will terminate vehicle charging or result in vehicle cannot be charged The BECM shall diagnose invalid ChrgrInPwMde_D_Actl received per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number five (5) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 17] b) Malfunction Condition: ChrgrInPwMde_D_Actl = Not Used is received c) Confirmation Time: 5 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U049C-00 Invalid Data Received From Battery Charger Control Module b) Transmit BattChrgRdyStat_D_Actl = 0x5: Fault if conditions for req[PEV BECM ACCHRG FUNC 05] or req[BEV BECM DCCHRG FUNC 05] is satisfied c) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault if ChrgrInPwMde_D_Actl != Not Used is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Failure will terminate vehicle charging or result in vehicle cannot be charged The BECM shall diagnose lost communication with BCCM per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number five (5) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 17] b) Malfunction Condition: ChrgrSysFaltXX_D_Stat = Not Used is received c) Confirmation Time: 5 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U049C-00 Invalid Data Received From Battery Charger Control Module b) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault if ChrgrSysFaltXX_D_Stat != Not Used is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Secondary OBD module fault status signal b) BECM only need to monitor the ChrgrSysFaltXX_D_Stat signal that has a specific fault mapped, per section 5.5.5.4 BCCM Reported Charger System Faults.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Malfunction Indicator Lamp (Check Engine).

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Off-Board Charger Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry condition: HEV_WAKEUP is high.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose lost communication with GFM2_DCGM per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number one (1) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 13] b) Malfunction Condition: EvseChrgOutHi_I_Actl = Faulty is received c) Confirmation Time: 5 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U057D-00 Invalid Data Received From Off-Board Charger Control Module The BECM shall clear the fault if EvseChrgOutHi_I_Actl != NoDataExists and Faulty is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) BEV only The BECM shall diagnose lost communication with GFM2_DCGM per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number one (1) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 13] b) Malfunction Condition: EvseChrgOutHi_U_Actl = Faulty is received c) Confirmation Time: 5 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U057D-00 Invalid Data Received From Off-Board Charger Control Module The BECM shall clear the fault if EvseChrgOutHi_U_Actl != NoDataExists and Faulty is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) BEV only The BECM shall diagnose invalid EvseChrg2_I_Mn received per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number one (1) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 13] b) Malfunction Condition: EvseChrg2_I_Mn = Faulty is received c) Confirmation Time: 5 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U057D-00 Invalid Data Received From Off-Board Charger Control Module The BECM shall clear the fault if EvseChrg2_I_Mn != NoDataExists and Faulty is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) BEV only The BECM shall diagnose invalid EvseChrg2_I_Mx received per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number one (1) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 13] b) Malfunction Condition: EvseChrg2_I_Mx = Faulty is received c) Confirmation Time: 5 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U057D-00 Invalid Data Received From Off-Board Charger Control Module The BECM shall clear the fault if EvseChrg2_I_Mx != NoDataExists and Faulty Invalid is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) BEV only The BECM shall invalid EvseChrg2_U_Mn received per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number one (1) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 13] b) Malfunction Condition: EvseChrg2_U_Mn = Faulty is received c) Confirmation Time: 5 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U057D-00 Invalid Data Received From Off-Board Charger Control Module The BECM shall clear the fault if EvseChrg2_U_Mn != NoDataExists and Faulty is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) BEV only The BECM shall diagnose lost communication with GFM2_DCGM per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number one (1) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 13] b) Malfunction Condition: message 0x25F: DigitalComm_Data is not received c) Confirmation Time: 5 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U027C-00 Lost Communication With Off-Board Charger Control Module b) Transmit BattChrgRdyStat_D_Actl = 0x5: Fault if conditions for req[BEV BECM DCCHRG FUNC 05] is satisfied The BECM shall clear the fault if message 0x25F: DigitalComm_Data is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) BEV only The BECM shall diagnose invalid DcChrgRdy_D_Stat received per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number one (1) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 13] b) Malfunction Condition: DcChrgRdy_D_Stat = NotUsed is received c) Confirmation Time: 5 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U057D-00 Invalid Data Received From Off-Board Charger Control Module b) Transmit BattChrgRdyStat_D_Actl = 0x5: Fault if conditions for req[BEV BECM DCCHRG FUNC 05] is satisfied The BECM shall clear the fault if DcChrgRdy_D_Stat != NotUsed is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) BEV only The BECM shall diagnose invalid EvseDcChrgIso_D_Stat received per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number one (1) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 13] b) Malfunction Condition: EvseDcChrgIso_D_Stat = NotUsed is received c) Confirmation Time: 5 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U057D-00 Invalid Data Received From Off-Board Charger Control Module The BECM shall clear the fault if EvseDcChrgIso_D_Stat != NoDataExists and NotUsed is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) BEV only The BECM shall diagnose invalid EvseChrg2_Pw_Mx received per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number one (1) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 13] b) Malfunction Condition: EvseChrg2_Pw_Mx = Faulty is received c) Confirmation Time: 5 second, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U057D-00 Invalid Data Received From Off-Board Charger Control Module The BECM shall clear the fault if EvseChrg2_Pw_Mx != NoDataExists and Faulty is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) BEV only

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Hybrid/EV Powertrain Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry condition: any of the following conditions is satisfied: a) HEV_WAKEUP is high b) CabinDrvSustn_B_Rq = Active c) BattTracDrvSustn_B_Rq = Active d) PwSustnRdata_B_RqTelem = Active e) BattTracDcFstSustn_B_Rq = Active f) ULoBattTrnsfrSustn_B_Rq = Active This entry condition corresponds to HPCM communication failure
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose invalid BattChrgInhbt_D_Rq received per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number two (2) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 14] b) Malfunction Condition: BattChrgInhbt_D_Rq = NotUsed is received c) Confirmation Time: 5 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0594-00 Invalid Data Received From Hybrid/EV Powertrain Control Module b) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault if BattChrgInhbt_D_Rq != NotUsed is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Receive this invalid state will not affect charging nor emissions b) BECM will illuminate the MIL when U0594 is being set for other reasons The BECM shall diagnose invalid BattTrac_I_EstVsc received per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number two (2) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 14] b) Malfunction Condition: BattTrac_I_EstVsc = NoDataExists or Faulty is received c) Confirmation Time: 5 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0594-00 Invalid Data Received From Hybrid/EV Powertrain Control Module b) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault if BattTrac_I_EstVsc != NoDataExists and Faulty is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) This digital signal is used as back up of battery current. Battery current sensor is already independently monitored. However, BECM software has a 1:1 map between DTC and MIL illumination. The BECM shall diagnose invalid HtrnAin_UHi_Actl received per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number two (2) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 14] b) Malfunction Condition: HtrnAin_UHi_Actl = NoDataExists or Faulty is received c) Confirmation Time: 5 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0594-00 Invalid Data Received From Hybrid/EV Powertrain Control Module b) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault if HtrnAin_UHi_Actl != NoDataExists and Faulty is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) This digital signal is used in another monitor The BECM shall manage each ChrgrSysFaltXX_D_Stat flags as listed in Table 26 independently. The BECM shall treat each ChrgrSysFaltXX_D_Stat = 0x1: Fail flag as a two trip MIL fault counter. BECM shall ignore other ChrgrSysFalXX_D_Stat signals that are not listed in the table. The BECM shall diagnose invalid BattTracRsrvSoc_Pc_Rq received per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number two (2) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 14] b) Malfunction Condition: BattTracRsrvSoc_Pc_Rq = NoDataExists or Faulty is not received c) Confirmation Time: 5 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0594-00 Invalid Data Received From Hybrid/EV Powertrain Control Module The BECM shall clear the fault if BattTracRsrvSoc_Pc_Rq != NoDataExists and Faulty is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) BEV only The BECM shall diagnose invalid BattDcChrgRms_I_Lim received per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number two (2) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 14] b) Malfunction Condition: BattDcChrgRms_I_Lim = Faulty is received c) Confirmation Time: 5 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0594-00 Invalid Data Received From Hybrid/EV Powertrain Control Module The BECM shall clear the fault if BattDcChrgRms_I_Lim != Faulty is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) BEV only
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Malfunction Indicator Lamp (Check Engine).

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From DC/DC Converter Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry condition: any of the following conditions is satisfied: a) HEV_WAKEUP is high b) BattTracChrgSustn_B_Rq = Active c) ULoBattSpprtSustn_B_Rq = Active d) CabinDrvSustn_B_Rq = Active e) BattTracDrvSustn_B_Rq = Active f) DataMntrSustn_B_Rq = Active g) PwSustnRdata_B_RqTelem = Active h) ULoBattTrnsfrSustn_B_Rq = Active This entry condition corresponds to DCDC and BCCM communication failure
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose invalid DcdcUHi_U_Actl received from DCDC per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number five (5) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 17] b) Malfunction Condition: DcdcUHi_U_Actl = NoDataExists or Faulty c) Confirmation Time: 5 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0599-00 Invalid Data Received From DC/DC Converter Control Module "A" BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault if DcdcUHi_U_Actl != NoDataExists and Faulty is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) No action taken to this fault. b) All Diagnostic Monitors complete normally. c) Charging performance not affected. d) Electric motor propulsion not affected. e) Regen Braking not affected. f) Emissions not affected The BECM shall diagnose invalid DcdcUHi_I_Actl received from DCDC per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: Entry condition number five (5) as specified in req[XEV BECM DIAG GENRQ 17] b) Malfunction Condition: DcdcUHi_I_Actl = 0xFF: Faulty c) Confirmation Time: 5 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U0599-00 Invalid Data Received From DC/DC Converter Control Module "A" BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault if DcdcUHi_I_Actl != 0xFF: Faulty is received, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) No action taken to this fault. b) All Diagnostic Monitors complete normally. c) Charging performance not affected. d) Electric motor propulsion not affected. e) Regen Braking not affected. f) Emissions not affected

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Software Incompatibility With Hybrid/EV Battery

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: At power up after valid TSL reading is obtained
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall CELL_ID not compatible per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: At power up after valid TSL reading is obtained b) Malfunction Condition: BECM software does not match the pack cell type c) Confirmation Time: Event Based Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U1030-00 Software Incompatibility With Hybrid/EV Battery b) Request the service light to be illuminated c) Request the MIL to be illuminated when the MIL setting condition is met d) Reduce both long term and short term charging/discharging power limits to 5kW (FHEV/PHEV) or 5kW (BEV) BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall latch the fault for the current power cycle. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Failure results in contactor not able to be closed. No electric motor propulsion.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Malfunction Indicator Lamp (Check Engine). Service Light(Yellow Wrench).

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Initial Configuration Not Complete

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: BECM during power off and is not being reset
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: req[XEV BECM DIAG FUNC 229] The BECM shall diagnose ECU initial configuration problem if any of the following configuration DIDs is not configured: 1. DID 0xDE00 Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set U2100-00 Initial Configuration Not Complete b) Request the service light to be illuminated The BECM shall clear the fault if DID 0xDE00 is written, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. src[ECU Configuration Specification v004 Section 4.2.1]
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: req[XEV BECM DIAG FUNC 229] Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set U2100-00 Initial Configuration Not Complete b) Request the service light to be illuminated
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: req[XEV BECM DIAG FUNC 229] Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set U2100-00 Initial Configuration Not Complete b) Request the service light to be illuminated

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Control Module Configuration Incompatible

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: BECM during power off and is not being reset
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: req[XEV BECM DIAG FUNC 228] The BECM shall diagnose ECU incompatible configuration if BECM DID 0xDE00 indicates any of the following conditions: a) BatterySerial[Year] < 19 b) BatterySerial[Day] > 366 Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set U2101-00 Control Module Configuration Incompatible b) Request the service light to be illuminated The BECM shall clear the fault if DID 0xDE00 is rewritten and the fault conditions are no longer present, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. src[ECU Configuration Specification v004 Section 4.2.2] The BECM will not allow a DID which meets these conditions to be written. This DTC might never be set
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: req[XEV BECM DIAG FUNC 228] Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set U2101-00 Control Module Configuration Incompatible b) Request the service light to be illuminated
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: req[XEV BECM DIAG FUNC 228] Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set U2101-00 Control Module Configuration Incompatible b) Request the service light to be illuminated

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Control Module Configuration Memory Corrupt

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: BECM during power off and is not being reset
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: req[XEV BECM DIAG FUNC 230] The BECM shall diagnose ECU corrupt configuration per ECU Configuration Spec section 4.2.3. Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set U2200-00 Control Module Configuration Memory Corrupt b) Request the service light to be illuminated The BECM shall clear the fault if DID 0xDE00 is rewritten and the fault condition is no longer present, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. src[ECU Configuration Specification v004 Section 4.2.3]
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: req[XEV BECM DIAG FUNC 230] Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set U2200-00 Control Module Configuration Memory Corrupt b) Request the service light to be illuminated
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: req[XEV BECM DIAG FUNC 230] Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set U2200-00 Control Module Configuration Memory Corrupt b) Request the service light to be illuminated

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: BECM during power off and is not being reset
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose abnormal shutdown error per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: BECM during power off and is not being reset b) Malfunction Condition: BECM detects that it did not shutdown normally c) Confirmation Time: Event Based Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set U3000-04 Control Module - System Internal Failure b) Request the MIL to be illuminated. This is one-trip MIL. The BECM shall latch the fault for the current power cycle. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) ECU microchip failure can lead to BPO and inhibit start. The BECM shall diagnose ECU microchip failure per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: BECM is operational b) Malfunction Condition: BECM HWIO feedback indicates a microchip failure is detected c) Confirmation Time: Event based Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set U3000-04 Control Module - System Internal Failure b) Perform slow BPO, if the failure mode results in HWIO activate slow BPO, per FuSa specification c) Perform normal BPO, if the failure mode results in HWIO activate normal BPO, per FuSa specification d) Set inhibit start for the remaining of the power cycle, if the failure mode results in HWIO activate normal BPO, per FuSa specification e) Request warning light to be illuminated if failure results in BPO or inhibit start; Otherwise request service light to be illuminated f) Request the MIL to be illuminated. This is one-trip MIL. The BECM shall latch the fault for the current power cycle. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) ECU microchip failure can lead to BPO and inhibit start
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Battery Power Off/Shut-down. Inibit Start. No Charging.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Malfunction Indicator Lamp (Check Engine). Warning Light. Service Light(Yellow Wrench).

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: BECM is commanding main negative or auxiliary contactor closed
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose any of the V_CS circuit or V_CONT_POS fault per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: BECM is commanding main negative or auxiliary contactor closed b) Malfunction Condition: BECM HWIO feedback indicates either pack voltage or positive contactor voltage invalid c) Confirmation Time: Event based Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set U3000-49 Control Module Internal Electronic Failure b) Request the warning light to be illuminated c) Inhibit start for the remaining of the power cycle d) Request the MIL to be illuminated. This is one-trip MIL. The BECM shall latch the fault for the current power cycle. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Failure results in vehicle not start
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Malfunction Indicator Lamp (Check Engine). Warning Light.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Battery Voltage

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: BECM is operational
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose 12V battery voltage low per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: BECM is operational b) Malfunction Condition: the BECM measurement of 12V battery voltage is lower than 9V, calibratable. c) Confirmation Time: 5 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U3003-16 Battery Voltage - Circuit Voltage Below Threshold BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault when the BECM measurement of 12V battery voltage is greater than or equal to 10V, for 5 seconds, both calibratable. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) No actions taken when fault condition presents b) All diagnostic monitors complete normally c) Charging performance not affected d) Electric motor propulsion not affected e) Regen braking not affected f) Emissions not affected

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: BECM is operational
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose 12V battery voltage high per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: BECM is operational b) Malfunction Condition: the BECM measurement of 12V battery voltage is higher than 16V, calibratable. c) Confirmation Time: 5 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U3003-17 Battery Voltage - Circuit Voltage Above Threshold BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault when the BECM measurement of 12V battery voltage is less than or equal to 15.5V, for 5 seconds, both calibratable. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) No actions taken when fault condition presents b) All diagnostic monitors complete normally c) Charging performance not affected d) Electric motor propulsion not affected e) Regen braking not affected f) Emissions not affected

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: BECM is operational
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose 12V battery sensor measurement fault per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: BECM is operational b) Malfunction Condition: the BECM measurement of 12V battery voltage is higher than 25V or lower than 2.5V c) Confirmation Time: 2 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U3003-64 Battery Voltage - Signal Plausibility Failure BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault when the malfunction condition is no longer present, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) No actions taken when fault condition presents b) All diagnostic monitors complete normally c) Charging performance not affected d) Electric motor propulsion not affected e) Regen braking not affected f) Emissions not affected

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: BECM is operational
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose battery pack interlock circuit open or short to ground in China BEV and PHEV per the following strategy: d) Entry Condition: BECM is operational and 12V battery voltage is less than 8V instantaneously e) Malfunction Condition: The HWIO feedback indicates interlock circuit is open; or HWIO returns sbar_in short to ground fault f) Confirmation Time: 50 milliseconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: i) Set DTC U3003-A2 Battery Voltage System Voltage Low j) Request warning light to be illuminated k) Set inhibit start fault l) Set No Charging Fault m) Set No DC BPT Fault n) Reduce both long term and short term charging/discharging power limits to 5kW (FHEV/PHEV) or 5kW (BEV) o) BPO when (TrnRng_D_Rq = 0x0 Park OR GearLvrPos_D_Actl = 0x0 Park) AND Veh_V_ActlEng < 2 kph BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall latch the fault for the current power cycle, if the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles; BECM shall clear the fault if a quick key cycle has occurred. Note that on a FHEV, the quick key cycle is the same as ignition key cycle (Ignition_Status). This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: b) Safety only component src[eTracker 15049305] src[REQ-207777/B] Quick key cycle is defined as a contactor close is requested by vehicle system or charging system after BECM initiates power down contactor open sequence before BECM finishes current power cycle. HWIO returns interlock status, [BAPI SBAR 001]/[BAPI SBAR 101] Note: This is for China BEV and PHEV only Note: TrnRng_D_Rq supercedes GearLvrPos_D_Actl on platforms with TrnRng_D_Rq Note: CX482/3 and CX727 will continue to use GearLvrPos_D_Actl The BECM shall diagnose battery pack DC fast charging interlock circuit open or short to ground for China BEV and PHEV per the following strategy: d) Entry Condition: BECM is operational and 12V battery voltage is less than 8V instantaneously e) Malfunction Condition: the voltage measurement at DC fast charging interlock open detection circuit matches the interlock open condition; or HWIO returns SBAR2_IN short to ground fault f) Confirmation Time: 50 milliseconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: f) Set DTC U3003-A2 Battery Voltage System Voltage Low g) Request warning light to be illuminated h) Set No DC Charging Fault i) BPO when (TrnRng_D_Rq = 0x0 Park OR GearLvrPos_D_Actl = 0x0 Park) AND Veh_V_ActlEng < 2 kph BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall latch the fault for the current power cycle, if the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles; Or BECM shall clear the fault if a quick key cycle has occurred. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: c) Safety only component d) BEV only Quick key cycle is defined as a contactor close is requested by vehicle system or charging system after BECM initiates power down contactor open sequence before BECM finishes current power cycle. HWIO returns interlock status, [BAPI SBAR 001]/[BAPI SBAR 101] Note: This is for China BEV and PHEV only Note: TrnRng_D_Rq supercedes GearLvrPos_D_Actl on platforms with TrnRng_D_Rq Note: CX482/3 and CX727 will continue to use GearLvrPos_D_Actl
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Inhibit start. No Charging. No BPT. Power Limiting. BPO.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Warning Light.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Control Module Improper Wake-up Performance

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: BECM detects CONT_PWR is low, and BECM is commanding main positive and main negative contactors to be closed, BattTracCnnct_D_Rq is not missing and is reporting valid state
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose contactor open request not received error per any of the following two strategies: Strategy #1 a) Entry Condition: BECM detects CONT_PWR is low, and BECM is commanding main positive and main negative contactors to be closed, BattTracCnnct_D_Rq is not missing and is reporting valid state b) Malfunction Condition: BattTracCnnct_D_Rq = Open is not received c) Confirmation Time: Event based Strategy #2 a) Entry Condition: BECM is operational b) Malfunction Condition: ISO functional safety HWIO feedback indicates CONT_PWR under voltage is confirmed c) Confirmation Time: Event based Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set U3012-00 Control Module Improper Wake-up Performance b) Request the warning light to be illuminated c) Perform normal BPO d) Request the MIL to be illuminated. This is one trip MIL. The BECM shall latch the fault for the current power cycle. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Failure disables electric propulsion
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Malfunction Indicator Lamp (Check Engine). Warning Light.

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_FREEZE_FRAME.DID_REFS: did_F400 did_F402 did_F404 did_F405 did_F40C did_F40D did_F41F did_F420 did_F440 did_F442 did_F449 did_F45B

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: BECM detects CONT_PWR is low, and BECM is commanding main positive and main negative contactors to be closed, BattTracCnnct_D_Rq is not missing and is reporting valid state
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose CONT_PWR too low to close contactors error per any of the following strategies: a) Entry Condition: BECM is operational b) Malfunction Condition: 1. BattTracCnnct_D_Rq = 0x1 Close OR contactors are required to be closed for plug-in charging or any other reason, and 2. CONT_PWR < 9V, and 3. B+ >= 9V, and 4. Main Pos has not been commanded closed for the last time in a contactor closure sequence c) Confirmation Time: 100ms, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set U3012-16 Control Module Improper Wake-up Performance - Circuit Voltage Below Threshold b) Request the warning light to be illuminated c) Request the MIL to be illuminated. This is one trip MIL. d) Transmit BattChrgRdyStat_D_Actl = 0x5: Fault if conditions for req[PEV BECM DBACCHRG FUNC 05] or req[PEV BECM SBACCHRG FUNC 05] or req[PEV BECM DBDCCHRG FUNC 05] or req[PEV BECM SBDCCHRG FUNC 05] is satisfied e) Set No DC BPT Fault f) Set inhibit start fault The BECM shall latch the fault for the current power cycle. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault results in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: The BECM shall diagnose CONT_PWR too low to close DCFC contactors error per any of the following strategies: a) Entry Condition: BECM is operational b) Malfunction Condition: 1. DcChrgRdy_D_Stat = 0x4: Precharge, and 2. CONT_PWR < 9V, and 3. B+ >= 9V, and 4. DC Pos has not been commanded closed c) Confirmation Time: 100ms, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set U3012-16 Control Module Improper Wake-up Performance - Circuit Voltage Below Threshold b) Request the service light to be illuminated c) Transmit BattChrgRdyStat_D_Actl = 0x5: Fault if conditions for req[PEV BECM DBDCCHRG FUNC 05] or req[PEV BECM SBDCCHRG FUNC 05] is satisfied The BECM shall latch the fault for the current power cycle. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. Note: NA/EU BEV only
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Malfunction Indicator Lamp (Check Engine). Warning Light.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Control Module Wake-up Circuit "A" Low

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: BECM is driving HEV_WAKEUP driver high
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose HEV_WAKEUP faulted active low per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: BECM is driving HEV_WAKEUP driver high b) Malfunction Condition: BECM HEV_WAKEUP input feedback signal indicates HEV_WAKEUP is low c) Confirmation Time: 3 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U301B-00 Control Module Wake-up Circuit "A" Low b) Request service light to be illuminated BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. In addition, BECM shall assert HEV_WAKEUP for 5 seconds once entering OSDT and de-assert HEV_WAKEUP for the remaining of the ODST. The BECM shall clear the fault when HWIO feedback indicates the malfunction is no longer present, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Overt fault for both system level active low or module level active low
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Service Light(Yellow Wrench).

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Control Module Wake-up Circuit "A" High

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: BECM is not driving HEV_WAKEUP driver high
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose HEV_WAKEUP driver stuck high per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: BECM is not driving HEV_WAKEUP driver high b) Malfunction Condition: BECM HEV_WAKEUP driver feedback signal indicates circuit is driving HEV_WAKEUP high c) Confirmation Time: 30 seconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U301C-00 Control Module Wake-up Circuit "A" High b) Request service light to be illuminated BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. In addition, BECM shall assert HEV_WAKEUP for 5 seconds once entering OSDT and de-assert HEV_WAKEUP for the remaining of the ODST, and reduce the fault confirmation time to 10 seconds, calibratable. The BECM shall clear the fault when HWIO feedback indicates the malfunction is no longer present, without confirmation time. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) No action taken to this fault. b) All Diagnostic Monitors complete normally. c) Charging performance not affected. d) Electric motor propulsion not affected. e) Regen Braking not affected. f) Emissions not affected
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Service Light(Yellow Wrench).

DTC.DESCRIPTION: High Voltage System Interlock Circuit "B" Low

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: The main positive and auxiliary contactors are closed, HEV_WAKEUP is high or BECM is awake due to an active CAN sustain signal, ChrgrOutHi_U_Actl is not missing and is reporting a valid state, and battery pack voltage is valid
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose interlock circuit open at BCCM side per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: The main positive and auxiliary contactors are closed, HEV_WAKEUP is high or BECM is awake due to an active CAN sustain signal, ChrgrOutHi_U_Actl is not missing and is reporting a valid state, and battery pack voltage is valid b) Malfunction Condition: abs(ChrgrOutHi_U_Actl battery pack voltage) is greater than a 50V calibratable threshold c) Confirmation Time: 10 counts, where timer increment by 1 for every 100ms Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U3513-00 High Voltage System Interlock Circuit "B" Low b) Request service light to be illuminated c) Transmit BattChrgRdyStat_D_Actl = 0x5: Fault if conditions for req[PEV BECM ACCHRG FUNC 05] or req[BEV BECM DCCHRG FUNC 05] is satisfied BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall latch the fault for the current power cycle. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Safety only component
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Service Light(Yellow Wrench).

DTC.DESCRIPTION: High Voltage System Interlock Circuit "C" Low

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: The main positive and auxiliary (PHEV only) contactors are closed, HEV_WAKEUP is high or BECM is awake due to an active CAN sustain signal, and DcdcUHi_U_Actl is not missing and is reporting a valid state, and battery pack voltage is valid
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose interlock circuit open at DCDC side per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: The main positive and auxiliary (PHEV only) contactors are closed, HEV_WAKEUP is high or BECM is awake due to an active CAN sustain signal, and DcdcUHi_U_Actl is not missing and is reporting a valid state, and battery pack voltage is valid b) Malfunction Condition: abs(DcdcUHi_U_Actl battery pack voltage) is greater than a 50V calibratable threshold c) Confirmation Time: 10 counts, where timer increment by 1 for every 100ms Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U3517-00 High Voltage System Interlock Circuit "C" Low b) Request service light to be illuminated BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall latch the fault for the current power cycle. If the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Safety only component
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Service Light(Yellow Wrench).

DTC.DESCRIPTION: High Voltage System Interlock Circuit "D"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: BECM is operational
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose SBAR2_IN short to low voltage battery circuit faulted per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: BECM is operational b) Malfunction Condition: either SBAR2_IN short to low voltage battery circuit fault is detected c) Confirmation Time: 50 milliseconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U3519-00 High Voltage System Interlock Circuit "D" b) Request service light to be illuminated c) Transmit BattChrgRdyStat_D_Actl = 0x5: Fault if conditions for req[BEV BECM DCCHRG FUNC 05] is satisfied BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall latch the fault for the current power cycle, if the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Safety only component b) BEV only
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Service Light(Yellow Wrench).

DTC.DESCRIPTION: High Voltage System Interlock Circuit "D" Low

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Entry Condition: BECM is operational
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The BECM shall diagnose battery pack DC fast charging interlock circuit open or short to ground per the following strategy: a) Entry Condition: BECM is operational b) Malfunction Condition: the voltage measurement at DC fast charging interlock open detection circuit matches the interlock open condition; or HWIO returns SBAR2_IN short to ground fault c) Confirmation Time: 50 milliseconds, calibratable Once the fault condition is confirmed, the BECM shall perform the following: a) Set DTC U351B-00 High Voltage System Interlock Circuit "D" Low b) Request service light to be illuminated c) Transmit BattChrgRdyStat_D_Actl = 0x5: Fault if conditions for req[BEV BECM DCCHRG FUNC 05] is satisfied BECM shall detect this fault during ODST. The BECM shall latch the fault for the current power cycle, if the malfunction condition is present at BECM power off, BECM shall not carry it over power cycles; Or BECM shall clear the fault if a quick key cycle has occurred. This fault does not result in illuminating the MIL per following engineering justifications: a) Safety only component b) BEV only
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Service Light(Yellow Wrench).
